# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MyQueue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # 5 minutes in seconds

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySNSTopic'

  MyQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.Arn

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: arn:aws:sqs:REGION:ACCOUNT_ID:MyQueue # Replace REGION, ACCOUNT_ID with your actual region and account ID
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: "URL of the SQS queue"
    Value: !GetAtt MyQueue.QueueUrl
  SNSTopicARN:
    Description: "ARN of the SNS topic"
    Value: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.Arn
